ref: Then they struck blind everyone in the crowd, and none of them could even find the door.

translated: The people of the land did what was evil in the sight of the Lord, and they perished because of their sins; the rich, the poor, those who committed sins, and the innocent who were caught up in the destruction of the wicked. The story of Sodom

ref: When you try to farm the land, it won't produce anything for you. From now on, you'll be without a home, and you'll spend the rest of your life wandering from place to place.

translated: And when he came here, they said that he found Ezra and Azor here; there were many good ones here. Then he gave them food to eat with Ezra and Azor.

ref: ‚ÄúGod understands what will happen on the day you eat fruit from that tree. You will see what you have done, and you will know the difference between right and wrong, just as God does.‚Äù

translated: God said that if they keep His commandments, they will live forever, but if they do not, they will die eternally.

ref: She also realized that Shelah was now a grown man, but she had not been allowed to marry him. So she decided to dress in something other than her widow's clothes and to cover her face with a veil. After this, she sat outside the town of Enaim on the road to Timnah.
